org.drinkless.td.libcore.telegram

Class TdApi.UpdateNewInlineQuery

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.drinkless.td.libcore.telegram.TdApi.Object
      • org.drinkless.td.libcore.telegram.TdApi.Update
        • org.drinkless.td.libcore.telegram.TdApi.UpdateNewInlineQuery
  • Enclosing class:
    TdApi

    public static class TdApi.UpdateNewInlineQuery
extends TdApi.Update
    A new incoming inline query; for bots only.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      TdApi.ChatType chatType
      The type of the chat, from which the query originated; may be null if unknown.

      Identifier uniquely determining type of the object.
      long id
      Unique query identifier.
      java.lang.String offset
      Offset of the first entry to return.
      java.lang.String query
      Text of the query.
      long senderUserId
      Identifier of the user who sent the query.
      TdApi.Location userLocation
      User location; may be null.

    • Constructor Detail

      • UpdateNewInlineQuery

        public UpdateNewInlineQuery()
        A new incoming inline query; for bots only.

      • UpdateNewInlineQuery

        public UpdateNewInlineQuery(long id,
                            long senderUserId,
                            TdApi.Location userLocation,
                            TdApi.ChatType chatType,
                            java.lang.String query,
                            java.lang.String offset)
        A new incoming inline query; for bots only.
        Parameters:
        id - Unique query identifier.
        senderUserId - Identifier of the user who sent the query.
        userLocation - User location; may be null.
        chatType - The type of the chat, from which the query originated; may be null if unknown.
        query - Text of the query.
        offset - Offset of the first entry to return.
